name: Bhai Harbhajan Singh Mauji
body: Over the years, I have heard the name of Bhai Harbhajan Singh Mauji being mentioned by few connoisseurs of Gurmat Sangeet, but never had the opportunity to listen to his Kirtan until recently. The long search has finally led to some recordings, but unfortunately we do not have any biographical information or photo of his to share. If anyone has any information, photos or more recordings of Bhai Harbhajan Singh Mauji, please contact us.

tracks.name: Bhai Harbhajan Singh Mauji – 01 Shaan (Tabla by Bhai Mohinder Singh Shah)
Bhai Harbhajan Singh Mauji – 02 Patti Tore Malini
Bhai Harbhajan Singh Mauji – 03 Mouko Taar Le Rama Taar Le
Bhai Harbhajan Singh Mauji – 04 Gobind Ke Gun Gao
